get.summary: List ODAG Analytics Applications by type

parameters.name: appType
parameters.description: The type of ODAG Analytics Application.

get.description: Retrieves ODAG Analytics Applications filtered by type: `selection` (used as entry points), `template` (source Analytics Application for generation), or `generated` (Analytics Applications created via ODAG requests).

AppIdV2.description: The system-assigned ID for an Analytics Application.

AppNameV2.description: The name of an Analytics Application.

AppStateCondensedV2.description: Condensed state of an Analytics Application returned in `state` for Link, LinkUsage, Request, and ODAG Apps GET calls.

AppTypeV2.description: The type of the ODAG Analytics Application.

code.description: A unique code used to identify the template form of the message in i18n tables (language independent).

ErrorDetailsV2.description: A single error entry within an error response.

traceId.description: A unique ID of the trace which the error occurred in. Makes it possible to locate involved services and find log messages from the time of the error.

ErrorV2.description: A standard error response containing a list of one or more errors.

statusCode.description: The HTTP status code for the error. Generally speaking, the following codes have these meanings: `200` - Success, `201` - Success (object created), `400` - Error with user input, `403` - Authorization error (user lacks permission), `404` - Object not found, `409` - Attempt to change an object using an obsolete last ModifiedDate.

MetaV2.description: Additional metadata associated with an error.

OdagAppsResponseBodyV2.description: The response body for ODAG Analytics Applications.

region.description: The region the tenant is hosted in

tenant.description: Name of the tenant that will be called
